dct_description_sm: New York City WiFi Hotspots, 2019 is a point representing approximate location of public Wi-Fi hotspots as of 2019. Wi-Fi providers include ATT, LinkNYC-Citybridge (BETA), BPL, Cablevision, Chelsea, City Tech, Downtown Brooklyn, Harlem, Manhattan Down Alliance, NYCHA, NYPL, QPL, Time Warner Cable, Transit Wireless, and various partners. Columbia Libraries staff downloaded this dataset from NYC Open Data at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Social-Services/NYC-Wi-Fi-Hotspot-Locations/a9we-mtpn and reformatted to the geopackage format in September of 2023. Additional information about the data may be found at https://github.com/CityOfNewYork/nyc-geo-metadata/blob/master/Metadata/Metadata_WiFiHotspots.md
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
